title: WITHDRAWAL MANAGEMENT - 211info
text: BEAVERTON RECOVERY CENTER WITHDRAWAL MANAGEMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides medical monitoring and support to individuals who have a physical dependence on alcohol, opiates, or other substances. The average length of stay is 3-5 days. 17911 NW Evergreen Place Beaverton, OR 97006 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (855) 733-2632 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (855) 733-2632 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurance DOCUMENTS: Insurance information AREA SERVED: Washington County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet buses 48, 52 Services: Detoxification Other Services Offered At This Location: SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - MEN'S RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - WOMEN'S RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. BEAVERTON RECOVERY CENTER
